April 1, 2024 
Advisory Council for the Elimination of Tuberculosis 
What to know 
CDC consults with the Advisory Council for the Elimination of Tuberculosis (TB) on strategies to eliminate TB in the United States. The Federal TB Task Force convenes as needed for inter-agency federal consultation and information sharing related to TB activities.
Advisory Council for the Elimination of Tuberculosis 
The Advisory Council for the Elimination of Tuberculosis (ACET) provides advice and recommendations regarding the elimination of TB to:
Secretary, U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, 
Assistant Secretary for Health, and 
Director, CDC 
Feder
